use_cases: Organizing content into switchable sections within a single view
Creating multi-step forms or wizards with distinct steps
Building settings panels with categorized options
Implementing product detail pages with Description, Reviews, and Shipping info
Creating dashboard views with different data visualizations
ai_summary: A flexible tab navigation component with three visual variants (default, ghost, underline) and three size options. Built with class-variance-authority for consistent styling, motion/react for smooth transitions, and proper accessibility support with focus states. Designed for organizing content into switchable sections with clean, minimal aesthetics suitable for SaaS and developer tool interfaces.
